sections.content:

<parameter=code>
# Check current positions

        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if n['pixels'] > 5:  # Only show significant objects
            print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash'][:8]}... bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
